race.comment: Siding with the newcomer REEL DEADLY (8), a gelding by No Nay Never for the Ciaron Maher yard who kicks off here for strong connections. He's jumped out fairly well and finds a winnable race first time out with Ben Allen booked. FROM YESTERDAY (14) has been thereabouts in two runs to date, tackling a much stronger affair at Flemington last start when fourth at big odds. A repeat of that goes a long way to winning this. CHRONIC (3) is racing consistently, placing in his past couple over this route. He draws for a nice run near the speed and should be thereabouts again. BANK HEIST (2) ran a solid race first up over 1400m and should come on from that.
